#[derive(Default)]
struct ServiceConfig {
    host: String,
    port: u16,
    api_key: Option<String>,
    database_password: Option<String>,
    secret_token: Option<String>,
}

impl Default for ServiceConfig {
    fn default() -> Self {
        Self {
            host: "localhost".into(),
            port: 8080,
            api_key: None,
            database_password: None,
            secret_token: None,
        }
    }
}
